title: The Punch Line | Downtown San Francisco
content: The Punch Line | Downtown San Francisco. # The Punch Line. "Punch Line San Francisco is the best club in the U.S.A!". To this day, he loves to perform at the club to work on new material and is known for his last-minute shows, which keeps his fans on their toes. It all started in 1978 when Punch Line San Francisco opened in what was originally a dressing room for The Old Waldorf, an adjacent rock club. Jokes can be told anywhere, but the Punch Line's dedication to the craft of comedy and the intimate setting it creates for performers and audiences, helped us become the San Francisco Examiner and San Francisco Chronicle's readers' choices for Best Comedy Club. At Punch Line San Francisco, you can check out today's top comedians six nights a week, or visit one of our other sister-clubs: Punch Line Sacramento, Punch Line Philadelphia, and our larger club in San Francisco, Cobb's Comedy Club. Sunday, Jun 14, 2026  7:30pm.
